entries.title: Claude Agent SDK as foundation
Concurrent quality gates with asyncio.gather
FastAPI route ordering: specific routes before path parameters
MAX_RETRIES=2 for quality gates
Project memory captures real-time friction precedent
Use MCP Chrome DevTools for dashboard testing instead of curl
Knowledge tag filtering must align frontend and API intersection semantics
Memory routing.json can use memories key
Command execution friction prevention via steering files
Deterministic dispatch over agent self-routing
React + shadcn Luma + GSAP migration patterns
Surface ownership - what goes where (AGENTS.md vs steering vs workflow vs scripts)
Tag-based similarity for knowledge graphs without wikilinks
Knowledge quality gate must parse canonical YAML frontmatter tags
Agent extractor must use shared Claude runtime
Embedded agent chat should continue conversation instead of CLI resume
Worktree-first development is the core rule
Workflow and memory creation ONLY via CLIs
Claude Code settings use Bash(cmd:*) format
Delete settings.local.json if it conflicts with .claude/settings.json
Official builder write-back uses MCP tools, not raw file mutation
Documentation agent maintains shared user and agent KB
Documentation freshness is commit-anchored, not worktree-anchored
Scoped KB extract must preserve collection metadata
External reverse-engineering validation works best as a staged runtime drill
Feature chat fixes must be SDK-grounded, not keyword patched
Use builder CLI telemetry before reopening broad code context
Create specialist agents only at bounded lifecycle boundaries
Reverse-engineering validation must use an external repo
Optimize runtime behavior from browser evidence plus builder telemetry
